60	def _get_process_start_time(pid: int) -> Optional[int]:
61	    """Return the kernel start time for a process when available."""
62	    stat_path = Path(f"/proc/{pid}/stat")
63	    try:
64	        # Field 22 in /proc/<pid>/stat is process start time (clock ticks).
65	        return int(stat_path.read_text().split()[21])
66	    except (FileNotFoundError, IndexError, PermissionError, ValueError, OSError):
67	        return None
68	
69	
70	def _read_process_cmdline(pid: int) -> Optional[str]:
71	    """Return the process command line as a space-separated string."""
72	    cmdline_path = Path(f"/proc/{pid}/cmdline")
73	    try:
74	        raw = cmdline_path.read_bytes()
75	    except (FileNotFoundError, PermissionError, OSError):
76	        return None
77	
78	    if not raw:
79	        return None
80	    return raw.replace(b"\x00", b" ").decode("utf-8", errors="ignore").strip()
81	
82	
83	def _looks_like_gateway_process(pid: int) -> bool:
84	    """Return True when the live PID still looks like the Hermes gateway."""
85	    cmdline = _read_process_cmdline(pid)
86	    if not cmdline:
87	        return False
88	
89	    patterns = (
90	        "hermes_cli.main gateway",
91	        "hermes_cli/main.py gateway",
92	        "hermes gateway",
93	        "gateway/run.py",
94	    )
95	    return any(pattern in cmdline for pattern in patterns)
96	
97	
98	def _record_looks_like_gateway(record: dict[str, Any]) -> bool:
99	    """Validate gateway identity from PID-file metadata when cmdline is unavailable."""
100	    if record.get("kind") != _GATEWAY_KIND:
101	        return False
102	
103	    argv = record.get("argv")
104	    if not isinstance(argv, list) or not argv:
105	        return False
106	
107	    cmdline = " ".join(str(part) for part in argv)
108	    patterns = (
109	        "hermes_cli.main gateway",
110	        "hermes_cli/main.py gateway",
111	        "hermes gateway",
112	        "gateway/run.py",
113	    )
114	    return any(pattern in cmdline for pattern in patterns)
115	
116	
117	def _build_pid_record() -> dict:
118	    return {
119	        "pid": os.getpid(),
120	        "kind": _GATEWAY_KIND,
121	        "argv": list(sys.argv),
122	        "start_time": _get_process_start_time(os.getpid()),
123	    }
124	
125	
126	def _build_runtime_status_record() -> dict[str, Any]:
127	    payload = _build_pid_record()
128	    payload.update({
129	        "gateway_state": "starting",
130	        "exit_reason": None,
131	        "platforms": {},
132	        "updated_at": _utc_now_iso(),
133	    })
134	    return payload

137	def _read_json_file(path: Path) -> Optional[dict[str, Any]]:
138	    if not path.exists():
139	        return None
